title: Chandigarh NTT, JBT, TGT & PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026 -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. paragraphs: Chandigarh NTT, JBT, TGT & PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026: The Department of Education, Chandigarh, has issued a notification for NTT, JBT, TGT & PGT Teacher positions. The recruitment drive comprises 582 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the Chandigarh NTT, JBT, TGT & PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026 official notification and apply before August 2026, the last Date. Also, see all the information related to the post on the official website. All relevant information regarding the Chandigarh NTT, JBT, TGT & PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
